v2_facts.definition: {'content': 'Treatment-related adverse events (TRAEs): NIVO+chemo vs chemo - Any grade 95% vs 89%; Grade 3-4 60% vs 45%; Led to discontinuation 38% vs 25%', 'page': 1}
